ActiveWorkspaceHeader.description: Active workspace identifier for browser-scoped daemon requests.
ActiveWorkspaceHeader.name: X-rc-Workspace-ID

FileID.description: Opaque daemon-issued workflow memory file identifier.
FileID.name: file_id

LastEventID.description: Stable SSE cursor for resumable run streaming.
LastEventID.name: Last-Event-ID

Limit.description: Maximum number of runs to return.
Limit.name: limit

WorkspaceFilterQuery.description: Optional workspace filter for run inventory reads.
WorkspaceFilterQuery.name: workspace

Conflict.description: Requested operation conflicts with current daemon state.

Forbidden.description: Request was rejected by browser-facing transport security.

InvalidRequest.description: Request body or parameters were malformed.

StaleWorkspace.description: Active workspace context is missing or stale.
